name: waiteraid
description: Reads and writes WaiterAid restaurant reservations, meals, guests, and queue entries.

risk.read: external WaiterAid API read of restaurant reservation/meal data
risk.write: external mutation of WaiterAid reservations, guests, and walk-in queue; approval required
risk.approval: read: none, read-only sync surface. write: required for all mutating actions (create/update reservations, guests, and queue entries).
